# Silver Swap
> SilverSwap is a non-custodial concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange on Sonic; this independent dashboard explains the protocol without holding funds or replacing its official app.

## What is Silver Swap
SilverSwap is an EVM decentralized exchange for token swaps, concentrated-liquidity positions, farms, dollar-cost-averaging tools, and fee auctions. Trades settle through smart contracts and liquidity pools rather than a custodial order book. Its Algebra-based concentrated-liquidity design lets providers allocate capital within selected price ranges, unlike constant-product pools that spread liquidity across all prices. “Silver Swap” can also describe unrelated precious-metal contracts; the crypto protocol is branded SilverSwap and uses the token symbol AG.

## How it works
1. The user opens the official app, connects an EVM wallet on Sonic, selects two available tokens, and enters an amount.
2. The interface obtains an on-chain pool quote showing expected output, price impact, and transaction details.
3. The user approves the input token when required, then signs the swap; the router transfers tokens through SilverSwap liquidity contracts.
4. Sonic validators finalize the transaction, and the output returns directly to the connected wallet. Liquidity providers instead deposit two assets into a chosen range and receive an NFT representing the position.

## Key facts
- SilverSwap is non-custodial: users retain wallet control and authorize every transaction.
- Its primary network is Sonic mainnet, an EVM-compatible layer-1 with chain ID 146 and native gas token S.
- The exchange uses Algebra concentrated-liquidity contracts.
- Supported assets and routes depend on currently deployed Sonic pools, not a permanent token list.
- AG is the protocol token; its Sonic contract is `0x005851f943ee2957B1748957F26319e4f9EdeBC1`.
- Fungible-token spending normally requires an ERC-20 approval before the first swap or deposit.
- Concentrated-liquidity positions are represented by transferable NFTs.
- SilverSwap contracts and addresses are publicly inspectable through SonicScan.
- Hashlock has published multiple SilverSwap contract audit reports.
- Sonic provides sub-second finality, although wallet, RPC, and interface delays can extend the visible completion time.

## Common questions
**Is SilverSwap safe?** Hashlock audits and verified contracts provide reviewability, but audits do not eliminate smart-contract, token, liquidity, oracle, approval, or interface risk.

**Who holds my funds?** Your wallet holds idle assets; signed transactions move assets into protocol contracts or directly through a swap.

**What fees apply?** A swap can include the pool’s displayed trading fee, price impact, and Sonic gas. Liquidity actions may require separate approval and execution transactions.

**How long does a swap take?** Sonic normally finalizes transactions in under a second after submission; wallet confirmation and RPC conditions can add time.

**Which assets are supported?** The official interface exposes assets with usable Sonic pools. Verify token contracts rather than relying on names or symbols.

**How do I start?** Add Sonic mainnet to an EVM wallet, obtain S for gas, open the verified official app, and review the quote before signing.

**What are the main liquidity risks?** Impermanent loss, out-of-range positions that stop earning fees, volatile tokens, contract risk, and incorrect range selection.

## App
- Dashboard: https://silverswap-app.github.io/
- App: https://silverswap-app.github.io/dashboard/

## Official resources
Website: https://silverswap.io/
Official swap app: https://silverswap.io/swap
Documentation: https://docs.silverswap.io/silverswap
Contract directory: https://docs.silverswap.io/silverswap/technical-details/editor
Liquidity guide: https://docs.silverswap.io/silverswap/yield-farming/concentrated-liquidity/adding-liquidity-to-an-existing-pool
Official X: https://x.com/SilverSwapDex
Official Telegram: https://t.me/Silver_Swap
Official Discord: https://discord.gg/ftYXBXK723
Audit index: https://hashlock.com/audits/silverswap
